author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Store printer and simulator tokens as GitHub secrets**

This is the first place the dossier introduces a required Wokwi CI token, and the same repo later talks to OctoPrint/Moonraker APIs; without an explicit `secrets.WOKWI_CLI_TOKEN`/`.env.example` convention a beginner is likely to paste credentials into workflow YAML or scripts. Add GitHub Actions/Codespaces secrets handling to the starter checklist before any CI or printer API example lands ([Actions secrets](https://docs.github.com/actions/security-guides/using-secrets-in-github-actions), [secret types](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/reference/secret-security/secret-types)).

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
